title: Projects
subtitle: Institute and ecosystem projects convert Active Inference into public artifacts, tools, research, education, and applied practice.
audience: Builders, researchers, maintainers, partners, and contributors looking for concrete work.
lede: Projects convert shared ideas into repositories, research outputs, learning infrastructure, media, events, and applied work.

sections.heading: Project Lifecycle
sections.body: Projects are prepared through proposals and measured through updates from the Active Inference ecosystem. All Institute and Ecosystem projects have dedicated pages with stable URLs for reference, sharing, and ongoing engagement.

sections.heading: EduActive Unit — Institute Projects
sections.body: EduActive hosts education-focused Institute projects: the Textbook Group, Active Inference Ontology, Active Inference Journal, Educational Course Development, Audio-Visual Production, Applied Active Inference Symposium, Seasonal School, Physics Course, Active Inference for Social Sciences, and the Video Improvement Project.

sections.heading: ReInference Unit — Institute Projects
sections.body: ReInference hosts research-focused Institute projects: Active Blockference, AICACP, Applied Active Inference Symposium, Cognitive Agent Modeling, FarmWorks, Generalized Notation Notation, GEO-INFER, Graphical Interface, Knowledge Engineering, Active InferAnts, RxInfer.jl, and the Theoretical Neurobiology Group.

sections.heading: Ecosystem Projects
sections.body: Ecosystem projects are community-driven initiatives across computational neuroscience, AI, ecology, education, creativity, philosophy, and applied domains. Each project has a dedicated page with a stable URL.

cards.title: AICACP
cards.text: A coalition-oriented project around AI alignment and care practices.

cards.title: Active Blockference
cards.text: Applies Active Inference examples and tooling in blockchain-adjacent contexts.

cards.title: Active InferAnts
cards.text: Multiagent modeling work linked to prior code and papers.

cards.title: Active Inference Journal
cards.text: A publication-oriented knowledge and research channel.

cards.title: Active Inference Ontology
cards.text: Ontology work for decentralized science and epistemic commons.

cards.title: Applied Active Inference Symposium
cards.text: A recurring symposium with prior events and presenter or sponsor pathways.

cards.title: CogNarr
cards.text: Cognitive Narrative ecosystem work for facilitating group cognition at scale.

cards.title: Courses
cards.text: Public educational work, including social science and physics course directions.

cards.title: FarmWorks
cards.text: Applied mini-project development around soil, agriculture, and ecological modeling.

cards.title: Fundamentals of Active Inference
cards.text: A textbook and learning-group pathway for core concepts.

cards.title: Generalized Notation Notation
cards.text: A text-based notation project for communicating models.

cards.title: GEO-INFER
cards.text: Geospatial modeling and active inference techniques.

cards.title: Knowledge Engineering
cards.text: Public frontend, literature meta-analysis, and organizational knowledge infrastructure.

cards.title: RxInfer.jl Learning Group
cards.text: Learning and development around RxInfer.jl examples and applications.

cards.title: Theoretical Neurobiology
cards.text: Support for theoretical neurobiology conversations and model development.
